✦ Get to Know Me ✦

My Biography

Christina Nguyen

Student · Designer · Artist

Hello! I'm Christina, a student passionate about digital media, art, and connecting with the world through meaningful work. Whether it's a class project, a piece of art, or a new skill I'm picking up — I put my heart into everything I do. Welcome to my corner of the internet!

🎓

Education

Currently enrolled as a student at UCF, working toward my degree with a focus on Digital Media - Web and Interactive Media with a Computer Science minor. I love combining technical skills with creative thinking in everything I study.

♥️

Interests & Hobbies

  • Digital Illustration & Animation
  • Game Design and Development
  • Video Editing
  • Web design / Front-end coding
💼

Experience

I've gained experience through Knight Hacks as a Hackathon Organizer and Designer as well as a Unity Tutor for kids! Each experience has shaped my perspective and strengthened my skills.

🛠️

Skills

  • HTML & CSS (web development)
  • Adobe Certified Photoshop & Illustrator
  • Written communication
  • Collaboration & teamwork

✦ My Story

Growing up, I was always drawn to creative expression — from doodling in the margins of notebooks to writing stories just for the joy of it. Over time, that curiosity evolved into a love for learning and building things that matter. I believe in putting genuine effort into everything I do, and I'm always looking for ways to grow, connect, and contribute.


This ePortfolio is a reflection of where I am right now — my skills, my voice, and my vision. I'm excited to keep adding to it as I continue to learn and create.
